title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Naukri.com Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Naukri.com Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Naukri.com Capital India has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Naukri.com Capital India:
Naukri.com Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Naukri.com Capital India!
